SELECT accurateCastOrDefault(value, 'UInt8') AS uint8_value FROM test_table;
SELECT accurateCastOrDefault(value, 'UInt8', 255) AS uint8_default_value FROM test_table;
SELECT accurateCastOrDefault(varchar_column, 'FixedString(5)') AS fixed_string_value FROM another_table;
SELECT accurateCastOrDefault(varchar_column, 'FixedString(5)', 'Default') AS fixed_string_default_value FROM another_table;
SELECT accurateCastOrDefault(156, 'Int8') AS int8_value, accurateCastOrDefault(156, 'Int8', 0) AS int8_default_value;
SELECT (SELECT accurateCastOrDefault(SUM(value), 'UInt8') FROM test_table) AS total_uint8_value;
SELECT a.value, accurateCastOrDefault(a.value, 'Int8') AS int8_conversion, b.varchar_column FROM test_table AS a JOIN another_table AS b ON a.value > 10;
SELECT DISTINCT accurateCastOrDefault(value, 'Int16', -1) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
